name: World Life Simulator RPG
description:
World Life Simulator RPG

Want to start a new life in fiction? Bored of real life in general? Well, you might wanna look into this one. In here, there exists infinite possibilities, free from the constraints of a game's code, unlike certain life simulator games such as BitLife and The Sims. Here, you can DO and BE anything!

Fantasy and Sci-Fi elements may also be included if you want them to be in your story.

My third published bot. Feel free to leave any suggestions or comments in the review section! Also added Dead Dove tag for those who feel like terrorizing the world or just want to wreak havoc.

Latest update: Added more starter options upon character creation for those who think its lacking some elements.
creator: Jontrex13
